children.name: How to publish a great episode: structure and checklist

settings.title: How to publish a great episode: structure and checklist
settings.description: From title to show notes—a practical structure and checklist for podcast publishing.
settings.content:
Suggested structure

  1. Episode title: clear topic and listener benefit
  2. Intro: 1–2 sentences for context and takeaway
  3. Chapters: agenda → discussion → examples → takeaways
  4. Outro: recap key points and next steps

Checklist

  • Is the target audience explicit?
  • Do you provide clear show notes and timestamps?
  • Do you include transcript/links where helpful?
  • Is it easy to discover later (tags, summary, cover image)?

children.name: Update: new podcast channels are live

settings.title: Update: new podcast channels are live
settings.description: Dedicated channels for Podcast, Series, and Clips—clearer taxonomy and a smoother listen.
settings.content:
What changed

  • Filter episodes by tags (podcast, series, clips, and more)
  • The home page highlights the latest items; sorting rules are configurable
  • Information architecture tuned for audio sites and navigation

How to use it

  • Publish new episodes under Podcast
  • Group content into Series
  • Extract highlights as Clips

settings.title: Announcement: holiday support hours
settings.description: Live chat and ticket response hours during public holidays.
settings.content:
Support hours

During holidays, online support hours will be 10:00 – 18:00.

Impact

  • Live chat: responses may be slightly slower
  • Tickets: urgent issues are prioritized
  • Knowledge base: browse and search as usual

Contact

For emergencies, reach us via the site footer or submit a ticket.
